feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Una richiesta comune per ascoltare musica senza fili.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, bluetooth è una tecnologia per l'elettronica.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! A common request to listen to music wirelessly.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, bluetooth is a technology for electronics.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedere conferma sulla tecnologia wireless.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'senza fili' si riferisce alla connettività.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Asking for confirmation on wireless technology.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'wireless' (senza fili) refers to connectivity.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Fondamentale per sapere il prezzo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'costano' si riferisce al valore monetario.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Essential to know the price.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'costano' refers to the monetary value.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere se c'è uno sconto disponibile.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'in offerta' significa che il prezzo è ridotto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Asking if there is a discount available.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'on sale/offer' means the price is reduced.

choicesEnglish: Does it have the operating system included?
Does it have the cat included?
Does it have the book included?
correctAnswerEnglish: Does it have the operating system included?

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Importante per un computer pronto all'uso.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, i computer hanno bisogno di un sistema operativo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Important for a computer ready to use.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, computers need an operating system.

choicesEnglish: How much RAM does it have?
How much water does it have?
How much hunger does it have?
How much of a hurry is he in?
correctAnswerEnglish: How much RAM does it have?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! La RAM determina la velocità del multitasking.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'RAM' è una specifica tecnica del computer.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! RAM determines the multitasking speed.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'RAM' is a computer technical specification.

choicesEnglish: Does it have an SSD drive?
Does it have a pasta disk?
Does it have a plaster disk?
Does it have a flying saucer?
correctAnswerEnglish: Does it have an SSD drive?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Gli SSD rendono l'avvio del PC velocissimo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, l'SSD è la memoria di massa moderna.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! SSDs make PC startup very fast.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, SSD is modern mass storage.

choicesItalian: È adatto per il montaggio video?
choicesEnglish: Is it suitable for video editing?
Is it suitable for the cat?
Is it suitable for the book?
Is it suitable for the dream?
correctAnswerItalian: È adatto per il montaggio video?
correctAnswerEnglish: Is it suitable for video editing?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Un'attività che richiede molta potenza.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si chiede se l'hardware è abbastanza potente.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! An activity that requires a lot of power.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if the hardware is powerful enough.

choicesEnglish: Do you have an iPhone charger?
Do you have a cat charger?
Do you have a book charger?
Do you have a dream charger?
correctAnswerEnglish: Do you have an iPhone charger?

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Un accessorio molto comune.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si carica lo smartphone, non il gatto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! A very common accessory.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you charge the smartphone, not the cat.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! L'originale garantisce compatibilità e sicurezza.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, l'originale è la scelta più sicura.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! The original guarantees compatibility and safety.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the original is the safest choice.

choicesItalian: Qual è la differenza di prezzo?
Qual è la differenza di colore?
Qual è la differenza di peso?
Qual è la differenza di altezza?
correctAnswerItalian: Qual è la differenza di prezzo?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedere quanto si risparmia con l'alternativa.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si confrontano i costi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Asking how much you save with the alternative.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're comparing costs.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Fondamentale per prodotti elettronici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, la 'garanzia' copre i guasti tecnici.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Essential for electronic products.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the 'warranty' covers technical failures.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Molti negozi hanno modelli da esposizione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'provare' significa testare il funzionamento.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Many stores have display models.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'try' means testing the functioning.

choicesEnglish: Is there a discount for cats?
Is there a discount for trees?
Is there a discount for rocks?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Molti software hanno licenze educational.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si chiede se gli studenti pagano meno.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Many software have educational licenses.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if students pay less.

choicesEnglish: Do you have this model in stock?
Do you have this model in your pocket?

correctAnswerEnglish: Do you have this model in stock?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Verificare la disponibilità immediata.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'stock' indica la merce pronta in magazzino.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Verifying immediate availability.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'stock' indicates goods ready in the warehouse.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Comune per acquisti costosi come un laptop.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'a rate' significa dividere il pagamento nel tempo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Common for expensive purchases like a laptop.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'in installments' means dividing the payment over time.

feedback.incorrectItalian: No, Mac è un sistema operativo.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, Mac is an operating system.

choicesEnglish: How long does the battery last?

correctAnswerEnglish: How long does the battery last?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! L'autonomia è fondamentale per i dispositivi mobili.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si chiede della durata della carica.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Battery life is fundamental for mobile devices.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the charge duration.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Una specifica importante per tablet e alcuni laptop.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, touchscreen significa che risponde al tocco.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! An important specification for tablets and some laptops.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, touchscreen means it responds to touch.

choicesEnglish: Do you have a case for this?
Do you have a pizza for this?

correctAnswerEnglish: Do you have a case for this?

feedback.incorrectItalian: No, la 'custodia' serve per protezione.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the 'case' is used for protection.

feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'estendere' significa prolungare la durata.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Many stores offer extra years of protection.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'extend' means to prolong the duration.

choicesEnglish: Is it sold with Windows eleven?

correctAnswerEnglish: I'm going to check the warehouse.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quello che fa il commesso per aiutarti.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'controllare' significa verificare se c'è il prodotto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! What the shop assistant does to help you.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'check' means verifying if the product is there.

choicesItalian: Ecco a lei, questo è l'originale.

Here you go, this is the broken one.
Here you go, this is the old one.
correctAnswerItalian: Ecco a lei, questo è l'originale.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Quando il commesso ti porta l'articolo desiderato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, si mostra il prodotto originale.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the original product is shown.

feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'prendere' significa scegliere di comprare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Final decision of the purchase.

choicesEnglish: I prefer to play it safe.
